menu_welcome:
🌟 *Holy Helper*

Welcome back, *{nick}*! Choose an option:
registration_complete:
🎉 *Registration Complete!*

Language set to {lang}. You're all set!
reg_sex_prompt: Welcome! Let's get you set up. What is your sex?
select_struggle_topics: Almost there, *{nick}*! Select the areas you are struggling with:
invalid_nickname: ❌ Invalid nickname. Use 3–20 characters: letters, numbers, or underscores.
nickname_taken: ❌ That nickname is taken. Please choose another.
session_expired: ⏰ Session expired. Please start again with /start.
expertise_updated: ✅ Your expertise topics have been updated.
select_your_topics: Select the areas you need support with (toggle on/off):
set_expertise_prompt: Select the topics you are qualified to counsel. Mentees will find you based on these:
no_topics_set: Please select your topics first using /settopics.
choose_topic_search: Select a topic to find mentors:
no_mentors_topic: No mentors are available for this topic yet.
all_mentors_full: All mentors are currently at capacity. Join the waiting list to be notified when a spot opens.
waitlist_joined: 🔔 You've been added to the waiting list. We'll notify you when a mentor becomes available!
waitlist_mentor_available: 🎉 Good news! A mentor slot has opened up for one of your topics. Go find a mentor now: /menu
mentor_req_msg_prompt: Send a short message to your mentor (optional). Type it now, or send /skip:
new_mentorship_request:
🙏 *New Mentorship Request!*

From: *{nick}*
Topic: {topic}
Message: _{message}_

Do you accept?
request_sent: ✅ Your request has been sent! You'll be notified when the mentor responds.
request_failed: ❌ Failed to send request. Please try again.
mentorship_accepted: ✅ Your mentorship request was accepted! Type normally here to chat with your mentor.
mentor_rejected: 📋 Your request was not accepted. Please try another mentor.
mentor_at_capacity: ❌ You are at mentee capacity. Please end an existing mentorship first.
mentorship_ended: Mentorship has ended. Thank you for your time.
no_active_mentorship: You have no active mentorship to end.
partner_not_found: Partner not found or not active.
focus_set: Focus set to *{nick}*. Your next message will go to them.
rate_mentor_prompt: How would you rate your experience with *{name}*?
rating_submitted: ✅ Thanks for your feedback! You gave {stars}
no_active_mentor: You don't have an active mentor yet. Find one below:
multiple_partners: You have multiple mentees. Please specify a target:
use_reply_cmd: Use `/reply @nickname` or `/reply number` to send a message.
chat_instructions: Just type to chat with your partner. Use `/reply @nickname` if you have multiple mentees.
journal_empty: Your journal is empty. Start writing!
enter_verse_hour: Enter the hour to receive your daily verse (0–23, UTC):
invalid_hour: ❌ Please enter a valid hour between 0 and 23.
enter_custom_time: Please type the time in HH:MM AM/PM format (e.g., 02:30 PM):
invalid_time_format: ❌ Invalid time format. Please use HH:MM AM/PM (e.g., 02:30 PM).
time_past: ❌ The selected time is in the past. Please choose a future time.
invalid_datetime:
❌ *Invalid format.*

Use `YYYY-MM-DD` for date and `HH:MM AM/PM` for time.

Example:
Date: `2026-05-15`
Time: `02:30 PM`
select_mentee: Select a mentee for this session:
apply_q2: What is your educational background? (e.g., Bachelor's in Psychology)
apply_q3: Tell us about yourself (experience, qualifications, and why you want to be a mentor):
application_submitted: ✅ Your application has been submitted for admin review. You'll be notified once a decision is made.
application_error: ❌ Failed to submit application. Please try again later.
application_pending: You already have a pending application. Please wait for admin review.
mentor_approved:
🎉 *Congratulations!*

Your application to become a mentor has been approved! You now have access to mentor features.
mentor_application_rejected:
📋 *Application Update*

Unfortunately, your application was not approved at this time.
please_use_buttons: ❌ Please select an option using the buttons provided above.
help_text:
📖 *Holy Helper — Commands*

`/start` — Main menu
`/menu` — Main menu
`/apply` — Apply to become a mentor
`/settopics` — Update your topics
`/reply @nick msg` — Reply to a specific partner
`/end` — End current mentorship

Just type normally to chat with your partner.
